title: Wolf (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wolf''' could refer to several things:

==Canon==
*'''[[Wolf]]''', a creature
*'''[[Loth-wolf]]''', a creature
*[[Clone Commander]] '''[[Wolffe]]''', also known as '''CC-3636'''
*The '''[[104th Battalion]]''', also known as the "'''Wolfpack Battalion'''"
**The '''[[Wolfpack]]''', a squad in the 104th Battalion
*'''[[Wullf Yularen]]''', an [[admiral]] with the [[Galactic Republic]], and later a [[colonel]] with the [[Imperial Security Bureau]]
*'''[[Trapper Wolf]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[pilot]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Wolf/Legends|Wolf]]''', a creature
*'''[[Wolf (corvette group)]]'''
*'''[[The Wolf]]''', a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]]
*'''[[Wolf cat]]'''
*'''[[Wolf Clan]]'''
*'''[[Wolf's Claw]]'''
*'''[[Wolf-Pack]]'''
*'''[[Wolf Sazen]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Mark Wolfe]]''', a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] '''[[Wolffe/Legends|CC-3636]]''', also known as '''Wolffe'''
*'''[[Wolff Kalos]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] Sergeant Major
*'''[[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]]''', an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''The [[Wookiee Liberation Front]]''', known by the acronym '''WOLF'''
*'''[[Wulf]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
